description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a playful dog with exaggerated, cartoon-like features. The toy has a light beige body with darker brown patches on its ears and around one eye, and it sports a pair of large, upright white bunny ears on top of its head. Its face is expressive, with a wide, stitched smile, a protruding pink tongue, and round, black eyes that give it a cheerful and friendly appearance. The toy sits on a round, flat brown base, and its limbs are positioned in a relaxed, seated posture. A small, round white tail is visible at the back, and a fabric tag is attached near the base. The surface texture appears soft and slightly fuzzy, typical of plush toys, and the overall build suggests it is lightweight and squeezable.
description: A plush dog stuffed toy with brown patches, large bunny ears, a smiling face, and a pink tongue, seated on a round brown base. The toy has a soft, fuzzy texture and a playful, friendly appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dog's smiling face, pink tongue, large bunny ears, and both front legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front-left angle highlighting the left side of the face, the left ear, and the fabric tag near the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, bunny ears, small round tail, and the base with the tag more visible.
description_view_3: Back-left angle showing the left side of the head, ear, and tail, with the bunny ears and base in partial profile.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and playful, with a wide stitched smile, round black eyes, and a protruding pink tongue. The features give the toy a friendly and happy demeanor.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both front legs forward, head slightly tilted, and bunny ears standing tall on top of the head.
